changes: Added rank and channel-alignment requirements between input and filters depending on data format.
Constrained stride and dilation vectors to valid Conv2D patterns for each data format.
raw_model_output_snippet: {"constraints_append":["input.ndim == 4","(data_format == 'NHWC' and filters.shape[2] == input.shape[3]) or (data_format == 'NCHW' and filters.shape[2] == input.shape[1])","(data_format == 'NHWC' and strides[0] == 1 and strides[3] == 1) or (data_format == 'NCHW' and strides[0] == 1 and strides[1] == 1)","(data_format == 'NHWC' and dilations[0] == 1 and dilations[3] == 1) or (data_format == 'NCHW' and dilations[0] == 1 and dilations[1] == 1)"],"constraints_remove":[],"per_rank_constraints":{},"changes":["Added rank and channel-alignment requirements between input and filters depending on data format.","Constrained stride and dilation vectors to valid Conv2D patterns for each data format."],"warnings":[],"confidence":0.52}
